description: Style NoteLooking for the apt footwear to ramp up your simple kurtas, linen pants, harem pants or even summery dresses? Then these sandals from catwalk, are the right choice. Simple yet stylish, this pair of footwear adds that new dimension to your look.Product DetailsBlack sandals with a midfoot strap with crystal embellishments and a plastic toe separator with crystal embellishmentsDark brown footbed with stitched detailing and branding embossed on the heel Smooth outsole with heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlightSizeHeel: 1.5& rdquo
